div.p: Description: System quiescent. No active checkpoint. Invariant: CHKPT_PENDING == NULL
Description: Rank 0 broadcasts proposal. Invariant: SENDER_RANK == 0
Description: Collecting readiness bits. Invariant: AWAIT_COUNT == WORLD_SIZE
Description: Parallel I/O to tiered storage. Invariant: IO_ASYNC_LOCK == HELD
Description: Status aggregation to Rank 0. Invariant: REPORT_STATUS != UNDEFINED
Description: Global integrity/checksum verify. Invariant: ALL_RANKS_COMPLETE == TRUE

ol.li: ATOMICITY: Checkpoint is valid iff all ranks succeed.
QUORUM: WORLD_SIZE must be static during S2.
CLEANUP: Error states must invoke fs_rollback().

div.p: [T3] all_acks_received GUARD: ack_count == world_sz ACTION: trigger_async_io()
[T5] report_agg_complete GUARD: report_count == world_sz ACTION: verify_checksums()
[T6] checksums_valid GUARD: global_match == true ACTION: commit_metadata()
